---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Exhibition · 2026 · Lookup"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: custom
    toc: false
    css: assets/2026/gallery.css
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <meta name="robots" content="noindex,nofollow">
        <link rel="preconnect" href="https://www.youtube.com">
    include-after-body:
      text: |
        <script src="assets/2026/gallery.js" defer></script>
---

```{=html}
<div class="ex2026" data-mode="curator">

  <section class="ex2026__hero">
    <div class="ex2026__kicker">CCGL9065 · Presentation Tool</div>
    <h1 class="ex2026__title">Author <em>Lookup</em></h1>
    <p class="ex2026__lede">
      Search by email or name to pull up an individual portfolio. This view is
      for the live presentation only — it expires end of day, 29 April 2026.
    </p>
  </section>

  <section class="ex2026__lookup">
    <div class="ex2026__search">
      <div>
        <label>Email</label>
        <input type="email" data-search-email placeholder="u3xxxxxx@connect.hku.hk" autocomplete="off">
      </div>
      <div>
        <label>Name</label>
        <input type="text" data-search-name placeholder="last or first name" autocomplete="off">
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="ex2026__results" data-results></section>

  <section class="ex2026__stage" style="padding-top:0">
    <header class="ex2026__stage-head">
      <div class="ex2026__stage-label">Selected portfolio</div>
      <div class="ex2026__stage-counter" data-counter>— / —</div>
    </header>

    <div data-stage>
      <div class="ex2026__loading">Loading…</div>
    </div>

    <div class="ex2026__controls">
      <button class="ex2026__btn ex2026__btn--ghost" data-prev type="button">← Previous</button>
      <button class="ex2026__btn ex2026__btn--primary" data-next type="button">Next →</button>
      <button class="ex2026__btn ex2026__btn--ghost" data-shuffle type="button">↻ Shuffle</button>
    </div>
  </section>

</div>
```
